channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oyo State Government Commends Security Agencies for Rescuing Kidnapped Students and Teachers
item.description: Eight weeks after gunmen abducted dozens of pupils and teachers from three schools in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State, the victims have been released safely. The state government praised the...

item.title: WA Avoids Comment on Taiwan's Proposed Perth Office Amid Diplomatic Tensions
item.description: Western Australia is refusing to comment on whether it supports Taiwan's push to establish a new office in Perth, as the Albanese government appears poised to approve the proposal despite growing dipl...

item.title: Philippines Reflects on 10 Years of the 2016 Arbitral Award and Future Actions
item.description: The Philippines marks the 10th anniversary of the 2016 Arbitral Award, which invalidated China's South China Sea claims and affirmed the country's 200-nautical-mile exclusive economic zone. Despite Ch...

item.title: SK Hynix Seleccionado como Favorito para el Crecimiento en 2026 con Perspectivas Moderadas
item.description: Analistas de Wall Street Journal destacan que SK Hynix, el principal fabricante de memoria de Corea del Sur, podría registrar un año destacado en 2026 debido a la demanda creciente de semiconductores ...

item.title: CBCP Supports Constitutional Process in VP Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: The Catholic Bishops' Conference of the Philippines (CBCP) has reaffirmed its commitment to upholding the Constitution and the rule of law during the ongoing impeachment trial of Vice President Sara D...

item.title: President Tinubu commends successful rescue of Orire schoolchildren and teachers
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has expressed joy over the successful rescue of children and teachers from Orire community in Oyo State after a 56-day operation by security forces. The President praised the mil...

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Controversies Over Refereeing and Media Bias in Egypt vs Argentina Match
item.description: The article discusses the controversial FIFA World Cup 2026 match between Egypt and Argentina, highlighting disputes over a disallowed goal and allegations of biased refereeing. The author argues that...

item.title: AFL's Strategic Push to Boost Sydney Ratings Through Marketing Initiatives
item.description: The Australian Football League (AFL) executed an unprecedented marketing campaign for the Fremantle-Sydney clash on Thursday night, aiming to elevate its profile in the competitive Sydney market. This...

item.title: Félix Auger-Aliassime Ends Coaching Relationship After Wimbledon Loss
item.description: Canadian tennis star Félix Auger-Aliassime has parted ways with his long-time coach, Frédéric Fontang, following his defeat in the Wimbledon quarter-finals. The 25-year-old player, who was the third s...

item.title: Tanzania's President Warns Against Misuse of Activism, Sparks Political Debate
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has warned activists she labels as 'activists by name' that the state will take action against actions linked to terrorism. The remarks were made during a July 9, 2026 ag...

item.title: Trump Uses Supreme Court Ruling to Dismiss Election Commission Members
item.description: President Donald Trump has dismissed the last three members of the U.S. Election Assistance Commission (EAC), a move that follows a landmark Supreme Court decision which granted him near-unlimited pow...

item.title: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean’s ‘Rein Me In’ breaks UK chart record with 16-week Number One run
item.description: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean’s collaborative single ‘Rein Me In’ has achieved a historic milestone by becoming the longest-running British Number One single of all time. The track, which first entered t...

item.title: Laura Geller's Spackle Hydrating Primer Offers 60% Off for Mature Skin Care
item.description: Laura Geller’s Spackle Hydrating Primer is currently available at a 60% discount on Amazon, priced at $15.20 (originally $38). This two-in-one moisturizer and primer is praised for its ability to smoo...

item.title: BC Premier Eby to Mediate Nurses' Job Action
item.description: British Columbia Premier David Eby has announced that a mediator will be brought in to address ongoing job action by nurses, marking a significant development in the province's healthcare labor disput...

item.title: UKZN Medical Graduate Runs Ultra-Marathon to Raise Funds for Struggling Medical Students
item.description: Dr Sizwe Zungu, a University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) medical graduate and specialist anaesthesiologist, is set to tackle the 161km Washie 100 Miler ultra-marathon in the Eastern Cape to raise R100,000...

item.title: Tanzanian Envoy Encourages Diaspora to Uphold Laws and Foster Unity in Malawi
item.description: Tanzania’s Ambassador to Malawi, Agnes Kayola, has called on Tanzanian nationals residing in the neighboring country to maintain unity and uphold local laws while strengthening their collective presen...

item.title: Amit Shah reviews port security plan and unveils smart border vision
item.description: The article discusses the announcement by Union Home Minister Amit Shah regarding the review of the Port Security Bureau (PSB) and the unveiling of a four-pronged 'Smart Border Vision' to enhance nati...

item.title: World Cup 2026 Injury Updates: Key Players Miss Key Matches
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has seen a wave of significant injuries affecting key players across multiple teams, impacting match outcomes and team strategies. Kylian Mbappe, France's star forward, suffere...

item.title: Former GOP Strategist Warns of MAGA's Midterm Challenges and Democratic Strategy
item.description: Rick Wilson, a former Republican strategist, warns in his Substack post that the MAGA movement lacks the capability to win a fair election due to President Trump's declining popularity, economic insta...

item.title: Political Tensions Escalate: BJP Criticizes NC Over 2010 Killings Amid Kashmir Statehood Debates
